vulnerabilities.title: Microsoft Office
vulnerabilities.name: Microsoft Office Remote Code Execution
vulnerabilities.description: Microsoft Office Excel contains a remote code execution vulnerability that could allow an attacker to take complete control of an affected system if a user opens a specially crafted Excel file that includes a malformed object.
vulnerabilities.short_description: Microsoft Office Excel contains a remote code execution vulnerability that could allow an attacker to take complete...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

vulnerabilities.title: Microsoft SharePoint Server
vulnerabilities.name: Microsoft SharePoint Server Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Microsoft SharePoint Server contains an improper input validation vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.
vulnerabilities.short_description: Microsoft SharePoint Server contains an improper input validation vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
